name: wsdm-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for WSDM (ACM International Conference on Web Search and Data Mining): venue fit, EasyChair submission audit, the no-rebuttal review reality, camera-ready via ACM production, artifacts and reproducibility for log-driven research, appendix-inclusive page budgeting, writing style, related work, experiments, and the single-cycle calendar. Grounded in the WSDM 2026 CFP (19th edition, Boise), WSDM 2025/2027 official pages, ACM DL proceedings, and dblp records checked on 2026-07-08.
